commit_message:
DurationUtils.toMillisInt() throws ArithmeticException on long overflows before clamping (#1657)

DurationUtils.toMillisInt() throws ArithmeticException when Duration.toMillis() overflows long before clamping (#1657)
javadoc_before:
/** * Converts a Duration to milliseconds bound to an int (instead of a long). *

* Handy for low-level APIs that take millisecond timeouts in ints rather than longs. *

*
    *
  • If the duration milliseconds are greater than {@link Integer#MAX_VALUE}, then return * {@link Integer#MAX_VALUE}.
    • *
  • If the duration milliseconds are lesser than {@link Integer#MIN_VALUE}, then return * {@link Integer#MIN_VALUE}.
    • *
* * @param duration The duration to convert, not null. * @return int milliseconds. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Converts a Duration to milliseconds bound to an {@code int} (instead of a {@code long}). *

* Handy for low-level APIs that take millisecond timeouts in ints rather than longs. *

*
    *
  • If the duration milliseconds are greater than {@link Integer#MAX_VALUE}, then return * {@link Integer#MAX_VALUE}.
    • *
  • If the duration milliseconds are lesser than {@link Integer#MIN_VALUE}, then return * {@link Integer#MIN_VALUE}.
    • *
* * @param duration The duration to convert, not null. * @return int milliseconds. */
entity_signature: public static int toMillisInt(final Duration duration)
